briefing_zh:
今天的 AI 研究圈呈现出两条清晰的主轴：一是「效率压缩」正在向更多模态蔓延，二是「智能体具身化」从理论走向实测场。

首先，效率压缩的浪潮从语言模型蔓延到视觉生成。**Moebius** 以 0.2B 参数实现 10B 级图像修复性能，通过跨尺度特征融合打破了极端压缩的表示瓶颈，成为今日 HuggingFace 最高热度论文（102 upvotes）。同样值得关注的是 **Variable-Width Transformers**，它打破了「所有层应等宽」的假设，为架构设计提供了新的自由度；**GLM-5.2** 以 IndexShare 稀疏注意力将每 token 计算量降低 2.9×，并支持百万 token 上下文窗口，定位为长程编码智能体的高效基础模型。**Looped World Models** 将循环架构引入世界模型领域，以共享计算模块反复精炼隐变量，首次在长程仿真中实现「深度换重用」的权衡解法。

机器人与具身智能方面，本周 alphaxiv 热榜上 Qwen 系列机器人报告密集出现（Qwen-RobotManip、Qwen-RobotNav、Qwen-RobotWorld），表明阿里巴巴正在全栈押注具身基础模型。**Playful Agentic Robot Learning** 提出了一个新颖范式：让机器人在接到具体任务之前先「玩耍」——通过自由探索主动积累可复用技能。**MemoryWAM** 则专注于解决机器人世界动作模型中的记忆困境，引入持久化情景记忆模块，使机器人在非马尔可夫环境中保持稳健。

在 HN 侧，AI 智能体的「社会面」引发了强烈共鸣：OpenRouter 的 **AI Agent Royale**（269 分，209 条评论）通过机器人对抗将不同 AI 模型的决策能力可视化，成为近期最具传播力的工程博文之一。**TesterArmy**（YC P26，125 分）用智能体自动化 Web/移动端 QA 测试，切入了真实且高频的痛点。《大西洋月刊》的「无限工作周」报道和 AskHN 关于编码技能退化的讨论，则共同呈现了智能体时代知识工作者真实的焦虑边界。
briefing_en:
Two major currents defined today's AI research landscape: the compression-efficiency wave spreading to new modalities, and embodied agents moving from theory into empirical testing.

On the efficiency front, **Moebius** achieves 10B-level image inpainting performance with just 0.2B parameters by overcoming the representation bottleneck through cross-scale feature integration — the highest-upvoted HuggingFace paper today (102 upvotes). **Variable-Width Transformers** challenge the assumption that all transformer layers should maintain equal width, introducing a new architectural design freedom. **GLM-5.2** from Z.ai brings IndexShare sparse attention (2.9x lower per-token FLOPs), a 1M-token context window, and effort-level controls for long-horizon agentic coding. Meanwhile, **Looped World Models** pioneer iterative computation for world modeling — using a shared module to repeatedly refine latent states, achieving deep simulation quality without deep architectures.

In embodied intelligence, this week's alphaxiv hot feed is dense with Qwen robot reports (Qwen-RobotManip, Qwen-RobotNav, Qwen-RobotWorld), signaling Alibaba's full-stack bet on embodied foundation models. **Playful Agentic Robot Learning** introduces a compelling new paradigm: letting robots engage in free, self-directed play before receiving task instructions, proactively accumulating reusable skills. **MemoryWAM** addresses the robot memory dilemma directly, introducing persistent episodic memory to enable robust manipulation in non-Markovian environments.

On Hacker News, AI agents' societal dimension dominated. OpenRouter's **AI Agent Royale** (269 points, 209 comments) made model comparison viscerally concrete by racing robots against each other. **TesterArmy** (YC P26, 125 points) automates web/mobile QA using agents — a real, high-frequency pain point. The Atlantic's 'infinite workweek' article and the AskHN thread on coding skill atrophy together paint a nuanced picture of the human experience in agent-augmented workflows: more leverage, but new cognitive burdens too.
viral_analysis_zh: **OpenRouter AI Agent Royale** 是今天最具传播力的内容。它把模型评测从枯燥的排行榜变成了「机器人竞技场」——视觉冲击感极强，「你想让一台冲向你的机器人跑哪个模型」这个标题本身就是完美的传播钩子。**TesterArmy** 的 HN Launch 帖以 YC 背书加上一句「智能体帮你测 App」精准踩中开发者痛点，125 分的成绩印证了 agent-powered QA 是个高认可度叙事。**Moebius** 则遵循经典的学术爆款逻辑：「0.2B 干掉 10B」的对比结论极度简洁，天然适合二次传播。
viral_analysis_en: **OpenRouter's AI Agent Royale** is today's most viral piece — it transforms abstract model benchmarking into a literal robot race, with the headline 'Do you want it running on Claude or Grok?' serving as a perfect shareable hook. **TesterArmy**'s HN Launch nails the YC formula: one-line pain point description backed by strong pedigree, earning 125 points and validating that agent-powered QA is a high-resonance narrative. **Moebius** follows the classic academic virality pattern: the '0.2B beats 10B' contrast compresses the entire contribution into a single shareable statistic — ideal for Twitter/X propagation.

huggingface_papers.title: Moebius: 0.2B Lightweight Image Inpainting Framework with 10B-Level Performance
huggingface_papers.tldr: Moebius is a 0.2B-parameter image inpainting model that matches 10B-scale industrial models by reconstructing the diffusion backbone with cross-scale feature integration. It addresses the representation bottleneck that kills quality in heavily compressed models, achieving deployment-friendly inference without sacrificing output fidelity.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: Moebius 是一个仅 0.2B 参数的图像修复模型，通过跨尺度特征融合重构扩散骨干网络，突破极端压缩导致的表示瓶颈，性能比肩 10B 级工业模型，同时保持轻量化部署优势。
huggingface_papers.authors: Kangsheng Duan, Ziyang Xu, Wenyu Liu et al.

huggingface_papers.title: DragMesh-2: Physically Plausible Dexterous Hand-Object Interaction with Articulated Objects
huggingface_papers.tldr: DragMesh-2 tackles dexterous multi-finger hand interaction with articulated objects (e.g., drawers, cabinets), a much harder problem than static object grasping because the target part can only move through sustained physical contact. The model generates physically plausible hand-object trajectories where hand motion drives part actuation, enabling realistic simulation of household and humanoid manipulation.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: DragMesh-2 解决多指灵巧手与关节物体（如抽屉、柜门）的交互建模难题——这比静态物体抓取更难，因为目标部件只能通过持续物理接触被驱动。模型生成物理合理的手-物交互轨迹，为家庭和人形机器人仿真提供关键支撑。
huggingface_papers.authors: Tianshan Zhang, Yijia Duan, Yanjun Li et al.

huggingface_papers.title: Playful Agentic Robot Learning
huggingface_papers.tldr: This paper introduces Playful Agentic Robot Learning, where an embodied coding agent uses self-directed free play — before any task instruction — to proactively build a library of reusable skills. The RATs (Robotics Agent Teams) framework coordinates play-time skill acquisition, then applies accumulated skills to downstream tasks, fundamentally shifting robots from purely reactive task-doers to self-motivated skill learners.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 提出「游戏式智能体机器人学习」范式：具身编码智能体在接到具体任务之前先自由玩耍，主动积累可复用技能。RATs（机器人智能体团队）框架协调游戏阶段的技能习得，从根本上把机器人从被动任务执行者变为主动技能学习者。
huggingface_papers.authors: Junyi Zhang, Jiaxin Ge, Hanjun Yoo et al.

huggingface_papers.title: S-Agent: Spatial Tool-Use Elicits Reasoning for Spatial Intelligence
huggingface_papers.tldr: S-Agent introduces a spatial tool-use agentic paradigm where the model accumulates multi-view evidence across time rather than making static frame-level predictions. By framing spatial reasoning as spatio-temporal evidence accumulation, it unlocks persistent state tracking that existing VLMs and tool-augmented agents lack, meaningfully advancing 3D spatial intelligence.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: S-Agent 提出空间工具使用智能体范式：将空间推理建模为跨时间的多视角证据积累，而非孤立帧级预测。通过维护持久状态追踪，突破现有 VLM 和工具增强智能体在三维空间智能上的关键短板。
huggingface_papers.authors: Yalun Dai, Hao Li, Shulin Tian et al.

huggingface_papers.title: Beyond Static Leaderboards: Predictive Validity for the Evaluation of LLM Agents
huggingface_papers.tldr: This paper argues that static benchmark leaderboards fail to capture the multi-dimensional deployment reality of LLM agents. Through 14 parallel studies on an MCP-based industrial agent benchmark, it examines multimodal extensions, alternative orchestrations, retrieval strategies, and reasoning modes, calling for evaluation frameworks with predictive validity rather than just static scores.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 本文指出静态排行榜无法覆盖 LLM 智能体真实部署的多维度需求。通过 14 项并行研究（涵盖多模态扩展、不同编排策略、检索方式、推理模式），呼吁建立具有预测有效性的动态评测框架，而非仅靠单一静态分数衡量智能体能力。
huggingface_papers.authors: Dhaval C. Patel, Kaoutar El Maghraoui, Shuxin Lin et al.

alphaxiv_papers.title: Looped World Models
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Looped World Models (LoopWM) are the first looped architectures for world modeling. A shared computation module iteratively refines latent environment states, resolving the deep-model tension between faithful long-horizon simulation (needs depth) and cheap inference (prefers shallow). The iterative refinement approach outperforms fixed-depth baselines while remaining compute-efficient.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: LoopWM 是首个将循环架构引入世界模型的方案，通过共享计算模块反复精炼隐变量，解决了长程仿真需要深度计算与推理效率之间的根本矛盾，性能优于固定深度基线。

alphaxiv_papers.title: GLM-5.2: Built for Long-Horizon Tasks
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: GLM-5.2 from Z.ai is a flagship coding model with 1M-token context, IndexShare sparse attention delivering 2.9x lower per-token FLOPs, improved MTP-based speculative decoding (+20% acceptance length), and effort-level controls for long-horizon agentic coding tasks — positioning it as an efficiency-first foundation model for agent workloads.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: Z.ai 发布的 GLM-5.2 是面向长程任务的旗舰编码模型，1M token 上下文，IndexShare 稀疏注意力将每 token 算力降低 2.9 倍，MTP 投机解码接受率提升 20%，并支持努力等级控制，专为长程智能体编码场景设计。

alphaxiv_papers.title: MemoryWAM: Efficient World Action Modeling with Persistent Memory
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: MemoryWAM introduces persistent episodic memory into World Action Models for robotic manipulation. Existing WAMs either use bounded observation windows (cheap but struggles in non-Markovian settings) or full history (accurate but expensive). MemoryWAM's persistent memory module bridges this gap, enabling efficient inference while preserving long-horizon environmental context.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: MemoryWAM 为机器人操作的世界动作模型引入持久化情景记忆，突破「有界窗口（快但健忘）vs 全历史（准但贵）」的两难困境，使机器人在非马尔可夫环境中既高效推理又保持长程记忆。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Variable-Width Transformers
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Variable-Width Transformers empirically demonstrate that transformer layers have distinct computational roles, motivating non-uniform width allocation across layers. Rather than treating all layers equally, the architecture adapts width per layer, achieving better parameter efficiency and performance by aligning capacity with per-layer computational demand.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: Variable-Width Transformers 实验证明 Transformer 不同层承担不同计算职责，因此应采用非均匀宽度分配。相比等宽标准架构，按层分配不同宽度可提升参数效率和性能，开拓了架构设计新自由度。

alphaxiv_papers.title: ImageWAM: Do World Action Models Really Need Video Generation, or Just Image Editing?
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: ImageWAM challenges the dominant video-generation paradigm in World Action Models by showing that image editing is sufficient for robot control. Video-based WAMs waste capacity predicting action-irrelevant temporal details; an image-editing approach cuts inference cost while maintaining control quality, questioning a core assumption in the embodied AI field.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: ImageWAM 挑战世界动作模型必须依赖视频生成的主流假设，证明图像编辑已足够支撑机器人控制。视频方式浪费算力在无关时序细节上；图像编辑路线大幅降低推理成本同时维持控制质量，对具身 AI 领域的核心假设提出质疑。

github_repos.name: Plaer1/junction
github_repos.tldr: Junction is a VS Code chat sidebar that routes conversations to local AI coding agents running on your machine. It keeps your code and conversations local-first, acting as a unified interface layer between the IDE and whatever local model or agent backend you're running.
github_repos.tldr_zh: Junction 是 VS Code 的聊天侧边栏插件，将对话路由到本地运行的 AI 编码智能体。完全本地优先，充当 IDE 与各类本地模型/智能体后端之间的统一接口层。

github_repos.name: dongshuyan/compass-skills
github_repos.tldr: COMPASS (司南) is a personal alignment skills OS for AI agents — a system of modular SKILL.md files that let agents adapt their behavior, tone, and task-handling to an individual user's preferences and workflows. Think of it as a portable preference layer that travels with your agent across different projects.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 司南（COMPASS）是面向 AI 智能体的个性化任务总控 Skills 系统，通过模块化 SKILL.md 文件使智能体按个人偏好调整行为、语气和任务处理方式，相当于跟随你在不同项目间携带的可移植偏好层。

github_repos.name: CortexPrism/cortex
github_repos.tldr: CortexPrism is an open-source AI agent operating system — a runtime environment for orchestrating multiple AI agents across tasks, with a TypeScript core. It positions itself as infrastructure for agent-native workflows, providing lifecycle management, task routing, and inter-agent communication primitives.
github_repos.tldr_zh: CortexPrism 是开源 AI 智能体操作系统，基于 TypeScript 构建，为多智能体协作提供运行时环境，包含生命周期管理、任务路由和智能体间通信原语，定位为智能体原生工作流的基础设施层。

github_repos.name: renee-jia/scholar-loop
github_repos.tldr: Scholar-Loop is an autonomous AI scientist framework: a multi-agent loop that covers literature review, experiment design, self-critique, and paper writing. With 130 stars and 26 forks in one week, it represents growing demand for end-to-end automated research pipelines that can iterate without human intervention.
github_repos.tldr_zh: Scholar-Loop 是自主 AI 科学家框架：多智能体循环覆盖文献调研、实验设计、自我批判和论文写作全流程。一周内 130 星 26 fork，印证了端到端自动化研究管线的旺盛需求。

github_repos.name: agiwhitelist/tokdiet
github_repos.tldr: Tokdiet is a local streaming reverse proxy between AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex) and model APIs. It intercepts and compresses token streams in real-time, reducing costs by stripping redundant context before it reaches the billing endpoint — a practical cost-management tool for heavy coding agent users.
github_repos.tldr_zh: Tokdiet 是 AI 编码智能体（Claude Code、Cursor、Codex）与模型 API 之间的本地流式反向代理，实时拦截并压缩 token 流，在计费前去除冗余上下文，是重度编码智能体用户的实用降本工具。

hackernews.title: A robot is sprinting towards you. Do you want it running on Claude or Grok?
hackernews.tldr: OpenRouter's AI Agent Royale pits different AI models against each other in a head-to-head robot race, making abstract model capability comparisons viscerally concrete. The 'which model do you want piloting a robot charging at you' framing is both genuinely useful for real-time decision evaluation and a masterclass in viral content design.
hackernews.tldr_zh: OpenRouter 的 AI Agent Royale 让不同 AI 模型在机器人竞速赛中直接对决，将抽象的模型能力对比变成直观的真实体验。「你想让哪个模型驾驶一台向你冲来的机器人？」这一提问框架既是真实能力测试，也是爆款内容的教科书级设计。

hackernews.title: Launch HN: Adam (YC W25) - Open-Source AI CAD
hackernews.tldr: Adam is an open-source AI-powered CAD tool (YC W25) that lets users design 3D models through natural language and AI assistance. The 211-point HN Launch validates strong demand for AI-native design tools that lower the barrier to mechanical/product design.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Adam 是 YC W25 孵化的开源 AI CAD 工具，支持自然语言驱动的 3D 建模设计。211 分的 HN Launch 成绩印证了 AI 原生设计工具的强烈市场需求，大幅降低机械/产品设计门槛。

hackernews.title: Launch HN: TesterArmy (YC P26) - Agents that test web and mobile apps
hackernews.tldr: TesterArmy (YC P26) deploys AI agents to automatically test web and mobile applications, replacing or augmenting manual QA workflows. The 125-point launch highlights agent-powered automated testing as a compelling go-to-market wedge: a clear ROI story, repetitive work that's painful to scale manually, and immediate business value.
hackernews.tldr_zh: TesterArmy（YC P26）部署 AI 智能体自动测试 Web 和移动应用，替代或增强人工 QA 流程。125 分的 Launch 成绩印证了智能体驱动的自动化测试是极具说服力的 GTM 切入点：ROI 清晰、人工扩展痛苦、业务价值即时可见。

hackernews.title: America Is Headed Toward the Infinite Workweek
hackernews.tldr: The Atlantic argues that AI agents are paradoxically extending work hours rather than reducing them: more leverage means more tasks attempted, creating an 'infinite workweek' dynamic for knowledge workers. This resonated strongly on HN (44 points, 22 comments) as a counternarrative to the productivity-utopia framing of AI agents.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 《大西洋月刊》指出 AI 智能体正在反向延长工作时间而非缩短：更强的杠杆让人尝试更多任务，形成「无限工作周」效应。这一反叙事在 HN 上引发强烈共鸣（44 分，22 评论），成为 AI 生产力乌托邦叙事的重要对照。

hackernews.title: AskHN: How do you handle skill atrophy from using coding agents?
hackernews.tldr: This AskHN thread (32 points, 42 comments) surfaces a growing concern among developers: heavy reliance on AI coding agents is causing skill atrophy in core programming abilities. The discussion explores strategies for maintaining human expertise alongside agent-augmented workflows — a meta question that becomes more relevant as agent adoption accelerates.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 这个 AskHN 帖（32 分，42 评论）揭示了开发者日益增长的担忧：过度依赖 AI 编码智能体正导致核心编程技能退化。讨论聚焦于如何在智能体增强工作流中保持人类专业能力——随着智能体采用加速，这一元问题愈发重要。
